100% Satisfaction 60-Day Money Back Guarantee

Your order today is covered by our iron-clad 60-day 100% money-back guarantee. If you are not impressed with the results, then just write to us and we'll refund every single cent.

Frequently Asked Questions

How does Optivell work?+
Optivell contains a carefully crafted blend of nutrients that support the natural cleansing processes of the eye. Over time, "plaque" can accumulate in the delicate tissues responsible for clear vision, leading to blurriness, straining, and visual decline. Our formula is designed to help nourish and protect these areas to support sharper and clearer eyesight at any age.
What is your money-back guarantee?+
Our money-back guarantee is a risk-free option we are offering because we believe in this formula so much. You can try Optivell for a full 60 days. If you are not completely convinced by the amazing results, you simply get your money back. All you have to do for a full refund is send us ALL the bottles (empty or not) and the packing slip.
How many bottles should I order?+
Most of our clients order six bottles at a time. The 6-bottle pack offers a massive discount, free shipping, and 3 free online guides. That's a lot of value and savings, especially since our clients usually want to reorder once they start seeing results.
How do I use Optivell?+
We recommend you take one capsule daily. For best results, take with 6–8 oz of water or any liquid of your choice.
Is this a one-off purchase?+
Yes, your order is a one-off purchase with no hidden autoship, clauses, or charges. The price you see on the checkout page is the only price you pay.
What are the ingredients in Optivell?+
Every capsule contains a proprietary formula of scientifically proven ingredients, carefully combined to support healthy vision and focus, including Kelp, Wakame, Astaxanthin, Chlorella, and Ecklonia Cava.
